title: Misconduct in Academic Research Policy
content: Defines research misconduct (e.g., fabrication, falsification, plagiarism in proposing, performing, or reviewing research, or in reporting research results) and establishes Morgan State University's procedures for reporting, inquiry, investigation, and adjudication of allegations of misconduct in academic research. Approved by the Board of Regents; compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
